title: Audio/Visual Support
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Audio/Visual Support
The classrooms, meeting rooms, lecture halls, and the auditorium on campus are equipped with audio and visual equipment, such as projectors, LED TVs, overhead projectors, blu-ray DVD players, microphones, and video conferencing systems.
Who is this equipment available to?
Current NYU community members
How much does it cost to use equipment?
Please refer to the Guidelines for Registering events in NYU Shanghai
How can users access this service?
For Classroom and conference room support, Video Recording, please email to shanghai.it.help@nyu.edu
Need help?
Submit a request on support.nyu.edu
Send a request through WeChat
Email to shanghai.it.help@nyu.edu
Visit the IT Service Center: Room N525 @ New Bund Campus
FAQs and more
Small Classroom (20 person) Technical Guide
Technical Guide for Medium, and Large Classrooms (50-60 person)
Smart Classrooms Instructions
